source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Question: 433
A teacher at a community college is expecting that 10% of her class will get an A on their exam, 15% will get a B, 35% will get a C, 25% will get a D, while 15% will get an F. All of the students participated in the exam. The actual values were that 22 students got an A, 18 got a B, 25 got a C, 15 got a D, and 20 failed the test and got an F. Which of the following is the correct chi-square statistic?
extraction_notes: answer field is numeric "4", but the record does not unambiguously specify whether it is a 0-based or 1-based choice index, so the original answer value is preserved
image field contains a PIL image placeholder string rather than a path or URL, so no image path is returned
source_intake_record.subject: Math

issues: metadata.extraction_notes mentions preserving an original numeric answer value of "4", which conflicts with the provided answer_text "23.52"
metadata.extraction_notes says no image path is returned, which conflicts with the provided image_paths and fallback image_manifest
metadata.image_paths is empty while top-level image_paths contains one image path

image_dependency: 题干已给出完整比例和人数信息，求解卡方统计量不依赖图片内容
虽有 1 张已登记图片，但未见题干显式引用图像、图表或空间/视觉属性
multi_step: 需要先汇总实际总人数，再按给定百分比计算各等级期望频数
随后需对 5 个类别分别计算卡方项并求和，属于多步数值推理
题目为五选一，但核心仍是单一路径的统计计算，不属于特别复杂的长链推理
verifiability: `answer_type` 为 numeric，标准答案为明确数值 `23.52`
题干给出完整输入数据，卡方统计量可由规则或程序直接复算核验
`registry_passed=true`，且选择题选项中包含目标数值，便于一致性检查
但登记问题中存在答案抽取冲突提示，略微降低可验证性置信度

What is the chi-square statistic for these expected and observed grade distributions?
